title: Makina - Rekt
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation using flash loan to manipulate price and drain liquidity pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates oracle price and then drains liquidity pools in the same transaction

monitoring_rules: Monitor for flash loans followed by oracle price manipulation and subsequent liquidity pool draining
summary: Makina Finance lost $4.13 million due to an oracle manipulation attack using a flash loan. The attack involved manipulating the oracle price and draining liquidity pools in a single atomic transaction. A guard could have blocked such transactions by detecting a flash loan followed by oracle manipulation and subsequent liquidity pool draining.
